briefdescription.para: Returns amount of free memory on GPU.
Returns specific implementation of IFastWindingNumber interface that computes windings on GPU.
Returns specific implementation of IPointsToMeshProjector interface projects on GPU.
Returns specific implementation of IPointsProjector interface projects on GPU.

memberdef.type: std::function< Expected< SimpleVolumeMinMax >(const PointCloud &cloud, const PointsToDistanceVolumeParams &params)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::CudaAccessor::CudaPointsToDistanceVolumeCallback = std::function<Expected<SimpleVolumeMinMax>( const PointCloud& cloud, const PointsToDistanceVolumeParams& params )>
memberdef.name: CudaPointsToDistanceVolumeCallback

memberdef.type: std::function< Expected< void >(const PointCloud &cloud, const PointsToDistanceVolumeParams &params, std::function< Expected< void >(const SimpleVolumeMinMax &volume, int zOffset)> addPart, int layerOverlap)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::CudaAccessor::CudaPointsToDistanceVolumeByPartsCallback = std::function<Expected<void>( const PointCloud& cloud, const PointsToDistanceVolumeParams& params, std::function<Expected<void> ( const SimpleVolumeMinMax& volume, int zOffset )> addPart, int layerOverlap )>
memberdef.name: CudaPointsToDistanceVolumeByPartsCallback

briefdescription.para: Returns specific implementation of IComputeToolDistance interface that computes on GPU.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool val, int maxDriverVersion, int runtimeVersion, int computeMajor, int computeMinor)
memberdef.name: setCudaAvailable

briefdescription.para: setup functions

detaileddescription.para:
Returns true if this platform supports CUDA (true for Windows and Linux, false for macOS and WebAssembly)
that isCudaAvailable() should still be checked on supported platforms

briefdescription.para: Returns true if CUDA is available on this computer.
Returns maximum supported by driver version.
Returns version of current runtime.
Returns Compute Capability major version of current device.
Returns Compute Capability minor version of current device.
Returns number of free bytes on cuda.
Returns cuda implementation of IFastWindingNumber.
Returns cuda implementation of IPointsToMeshProjector.
Returns cuda implementation of IPointsProjector.
Returns cuda implementation of PointsToDistanceVolumeCallback.
Returns cuda implementation of PointsToDistanceVolumeByPartsCallback.
Returns CUDA implementation of IComputeToolDistance.

detaileddescription.para:
returns amount of required GPU memory for CudaFastWindingNumber internal data,
mesh
input mesh

returns amount of required GPU memory for CudaFastWindingNumber::calcFromGrid and CudaFastWindingNumber::calcFromGridWithDistances operations,
dims
dimensions of the grid

briefdescription.para: returns amount of required GPU memory for CudaFastWindingNumber::calcFromVector operation
returns amount of required GPU memory for CudaFastWindingNumber::calcSelfIntersections operation
returns amount of required GPU memory for Cuda::pointsToDistanceVolume
The purpose of this class is to access CUDA algorithms without explicit dependency on MRCuda.
